issues.detail: Curl command downloads a tarball from an external source without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Bootstrap Spring Boot project with web/JPA/Postgres/security/actuator/validation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses starter.zip with an intermediate file and unzip; treatment uses the pipe-friendly starter.tgz curl-into-tar pattern documented in the skill.

scenarios.name: Configure Spring Security with JWT, CSRF disabled, public + actuator allowlist
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on deprecated antMatchers/authorizeRequests; treatment uses the modern authorizeHttpRequests/requestMatchers lambda DSL exactly as the skill prescribes.
